title: 08-1-3 Brian Igoe - Fuel Flexibility and Allternative Fuels for Gas Turbines
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 34]
Here's the technical information extracted from the image:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

| Operational concern                                                | Effect                                                                   |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Gas Fuels containing Hydrogen Sulphide H2S                           | Harmful to personnel                                                     |
| Poisonous even in small quantities                                  | Can result in hot gas component erosion                                  |
| Flammable                                                         | Sulphidation attack on some materials                                       |
| Acidic when water present                                           | Increased component attack in the presence of other contaminants, such as Sodium |
| Corrosive                                                          |                                                                         |
| Gas Fuels containing Carbon Dioxide, CO2                            | Reduced output for same volume input (lower heating value) |
| Acidic when water present                                           | Increased supply pressure                                                  |
| Lowers effective heating value of fuel                              | Combustor passage size increase                                             |
| Gas fuels containing Hydrogen, H2                                   | Leakage of pipe work - consider regulations - eg Group 2C approval        |
| Increased flammability                                              | Explosive                                                                 |
| Explosive                                                          | System design - flange joints and seals - embrittlement                   |
| Gas fuels containing Carbon Monoxide, CO                            | Harmful to personnel                                                         |
| Poisonous                                                          | Flashback results in damage to combustion components                       |
| Exacerbates flame velocity, especially if H2 present              |                                                                                                   |
| Flash back                                                        |                                                                         |

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   H2S (Hydrogen Sulphide)
*   CO2 (Carbon Dioxide)
*   H2 (Hydrogen)
*   CO (Carbon Monoxide)
*   Group 2C Approval
